issue: The audience-facing references slide (34) omits the keystone citation of the entire deck. Leaden 2018 (PMID 30210482) is pinned in-text on slides 4, 7, and 8 and is the source of the ρ=0.315 concordance that the whole S1 driver claim rests on — yet it is NOT in refs_short. Also absent: Price2018 (cited slide 12), QuinteroYanes2022 (cited slide 16), and Greenwich2023 (cited slides 16, 26). The slide sets 'full_pool_in_speaker_notes': true, i.e. the complete reference list is in speaker notes the audience never sees. A peer who wants to look up the foundational Leaden concordance cannot find it on the references slide.

report_evidence.quote: Leaden et al. 2018 (PMID 30210482) — published Caulobacter Δ*fur* RNA-seq ... The Spearman ρ = 0.315 concordance with our 4584-vs-4580 confirms Fur derepression as a major component of our signal.

fix_hint: Add the four in-text-cited-but-unlisted keys to refs_short on slide 34 — at minimum Leaden 2018 (PMID 30210482), Price et al. 2018 (Fitness Browser), Quintero-Yanes 2022, Greenwich 2023. Do not rely on 'full_pool_in_speaker_notes' for citations the audience sees referenced on content slides.
